name: S-7
events: 2 Jul 1942 S-7 sailed from Lavansaari Island for a war patrol.
9 Jul 1942 At 1617 hours S-7 fires a torpedo against the Swedish merchant Noreg (1431 GRT) east of Ark?sund, Sweden. The torpedo misses its target.
At 1958 hours S-7 torpedoed and sank the Swedish merchant Margareta (1272 GRT) about 9 nautical miles south-east of Ark?sund, Sweden in position 58°26'N, 17°13E.
11 Jul 1942 S-7 torpedoed and sank the Swedish merchant Lulea (5611 GRT, built 1922) about 11 nautical miles east of Vaestervik, Sweden in position 57°45'N, 17°00'E.
14 Jul 1942 At 1223hours and 1438hours, S-7 twice attacked a merchant in a Swedish convoy north of the Kalmarsund. During both attacks one torpedo was fired. Both torpedoes failed to hit a target.
27 Jul 1942 S-7 damaged the German merchant Ellen Larsen (1938 GRT) south of Venspils, Latvia. The German ship was missed by torpedoes but driven ashore after S-7 attacked with gunfire.
30 Jul 1942 S-7 torpedoed and sank the German merchant K?the (1599 GRT) off Paulshafen (Pavilosta, Latvia) in position 56°54'N, 21°09'E.
5 Aug 1942 S-7 sank the Finnish merchant Pojanlahti (682 GRT) with gunfire east of Uzava, Latvia in position 57°12'N, 21°20'E.
18 Oct 1942 S-7 departed from her base for a war patrol.
